eligible_applicant_type: Organizations represented by a fiscal agent with 501(c)(3) status
project_area: Racial, economic, social, and environmental disparities and injustice in Vermont, with a focus on equity in education, housing, criminal justice reform, immigrant rights, workers' rights, and access to healthy food
demographic_requirements: Priority given to programs that meaningfully engage and intentionally involve those most impacted by the problem being addressed
eligibility_summary: Non-profit organizations or fiscal agents with 501(c)(3) status, located in Vermont, with total annual operating budgets under $500,000. Excludes programs providing solely direct services to individuals, schools, colleges, individuals, research, litigation, capital campaigns, state agencies, businesses, religious activities, one-time events, or organizations outside Vermont.
